text: London Stock Exchange: Solid 2026 Guidance And Over 8% Shareholder Yield Supports Buy Rating. LSEG's proprietary real-time and historical datasets position the company well to benefit from increasing AI-driven data consumption, while management targets further EBITDA margin expansion of ~150 bp over 2027–29 on top of gains expected in 2026.
